summary: The 16 June 2026 morning edition captured the current verified oncology state and archived it as a dated briefing.
provenance: Backfilled from the previous dated briefing snapshot for the Global Portfolio Search Page changelog state.

headlines.title: Morning briefing becomes the front door
headlines.summary: The dashboard shifted from a static review page to a decision-first morning briefing that routes users into the underlying dossiers.

headlines.title: Screening, de-escalation and workforce signals gain a home
headlines.summary: OPTIMA, Galleri, bladder-preservation, and oncology workforce warnings were retained as explicit system-level records rather than being forced into treatment cards.

headlines.title: Non-drug developments now stay visible
headlines.summary: The dashboard began preserving cautionary and operational oncology developments that shape care even when they are not treatment approvals.
